bead.title: install/update: per-project install honors in-tree vs convention mode (install-in-project)
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

Without `--global`, `ddx install` must write the plugin into the project-scoped tree and link it into the project's agent paths, and `ddx update` must refresh that same project tree — in BOTH in-tree mode (<project>/.ddx/) and convention mode (no <project>/.ddx/, content under the XDG project dir). The two modes must produce correct, distinct skill-link targets.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/install.go:180 resolveInstallDirs(global=false) must set installRoot via ddxroot.Path() and agent/claude skill dirs under the project; install.go:229 remapSkillTargets and install.go:474-490 choose project-tier link targets. In in-tree mode the plugin lands at <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ and links resolve relative to the working directory; in convention mode it lands at ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name>/ and the project's .claude/.agents skill links point into that absolute XDG plugins path (install.go:474 comment).
- cli/cmd/update.go:66 (when opts.Global is false) must update the project install through ddxroot.Path() in whichever mode is active.
- Before dual-mode handling, install/update assumed a single in-tree project layout, so convention-mode projects got wrong link targets.

PROPOSED FIX
1. `ddx install <name>` (no --global, in-tree mode) installs to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ and creates project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
2. `ddx install <name>` (no --global, convention mode) installs to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>/plugins/<name>/ and creates project-tier links pointing into that XDG plugins/ path.
3. `ddx update` (no flag) updates the project install in whichever mode is active, resolved through ddxroot.Path().

NON-SCOPE
- Does NOT remove or alter the --global surface (handled in the install-to-agent child).
- Does NOT migrate legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Does NOT add agent-harness skill paths beyond Claude Code and Codex.
- Runtime lookup precedence is owned by the registry-resolver child.

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — project install paths route through ddxroot.Path(). Governing epic: ddx-602ae31a (Principle 2).
bead.acceptance:
1. A Test* in cli/cmd asserts `ddx install <name>` (no --global, in-tree mode) installs to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ and creates project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
2. A Test* in cli/cmd asserts `ddx install <name>` (no --global, convention mode) installs to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<host>/<owner>/<repo>/plugins/<name>/ and creates project-tier links pointing into that XDG plugins/ path.
3. TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode asserts `ddx update` (no flag) updates the project install in whichever mode (in-tree vs convention) is active.
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
